title: ERROR: Unsupported internal cell `$pow'
body:
### Version

Yosys 0.29+11 (git sha1 0b05a6425, gcc 7.5.0-6ubuntu2 -fPIC -Os)

### On which OS did this happen?

Linux

### Reproduction Steps

Hi there!

I've noticed an issue with the $pow cell for CXXRTL:

`top.v`

```
 module top(
    input  a,
    input  b,
    output y
);

    assign y = a ** b;
endmodule
```

Then execute:

```
yosys -p "read_verilog -sv top.v; write_cxxrtl top.cpp"
```

This is quite puzzling because I do not understand why the $pow cell is considered an internal cell, but I'm far from expert on this part of Yosys.

Thanks!

### Expected Behavior

Successful Yosys execution.

### Actual Behavior

Yosys says

    ERROR: Unsupported internal cell `$pow'.
